  • Method Details

    • createPushSubscription

      public SubscriberCreatePushSubscriptionRequestBuilder createPushSubscription()
      Create Push Subscription

      Creates a new push subscription for event notifications.

      Returns:
      The call builder

    • createPushSubscription

      public SubscriberCreatePushSubscriptionResponse createPushSubscription(PushSubscriptionCreate request) throws Exception
      Create Push Subscription

      Creates a new push subscription for event notifications.

      Parameters:
      request - The request object containing all the parameters for the API call.
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

      Parameters:
      request - The request object containing all the parameters for the API call.
      options - additional options
      Returns:
      The response from the API call

    • listPushSubscriptions

      List Push Subscriptions

      Gets a list of push subscriptions.

      Returns:
      The call builder

    • listPushSubscriptionsDirect

      public SubscriberListPushSubscriptionsResponse listPushSubscriptionsDirect() throws Exception
      List Push Subscriptions

      Gets a list of push subscriptions.

      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

    • listPushSubscriptions

      public SubscriberListPushSubscriptionsResponse listPushSubscriptions(Optional<String> filter, Optional<Integer> pageSize, Optional<String> pageToken, Optional<Options> options) throws Exception
      List Push Subscriptions

      Gets a list of push subscriptions.

      Parameters:
      filter - A CEL string to filter results; See the [CEL Search](https://developer.apexclearing.com/apex-fintech-solutions/docs/cel-search) page in Guides for more information; If empty, all subscriptions the user has permission to view will be returned; Filter options include: `name` `subscription_id` `client_id` `correspondent_id` `display_name` `event_types` `state` `http_callback.url` `http_callback.timeout_seconds`
      pageSize - The number of entries to return in a single page; Default = 100; Maximum = 1000
      pageToken - Page token used for pagination; Supplying a page token returns the next page of results
      options - additional options
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

    • getPushSubscription

      public SubscriberGetPushSubscriptionRequestBuilder getPushSubscription()
      Get Push Subscription

      Gets the details of a specific push subscription.

      Returns:
      The call builder

      Gets the details of a specific push subscription.

      Parameters:
      subscriptionId - The subscription id.
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

      The call builder

    • updatePushSubscription

      public SubscriberUpdatePushSubscriptionResponse updatePushSubscription(String subscriptionId, PushSubscriptionUpdate pushSubscriptionUpdate) throws Exception
      Update Subscription

      Updates the details of a push subscription.

      Parameters:
      subscriptionId - The subscription id.
      pushSubscriptionUpdate - Configuration information about a push subscription
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

    • updatePushSubscription

      public SubscriberUpdatePushSubscriptionResponse updatePushSubscription(String subscriptionId, Optional<String> updateMask, PushSubscriptionUpdate pushSubscriptionUpdate, Optional<Options> options) throws Exception
      Update Subscription

      Updates the details of a push subscription.

      Parameters:
      subscriptionId - The subscription id.
      updateMask - The fields to update in subscription
      pushSubscriptionUpdate - Configuration information about a push subscription
      options - additional options
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

    • deletePushSubscription

      public SubscriberDeletePushSubscriptionRequestBuilder deletePushSubscription()
      Delete Subscription

      Stops receiving events from a push subscription, and then deletes it.

      Returns:
      The call builder

    • deletePushSubscription

      Delete Subscription

      Stops receiving events from a push subscription, and then deletes it.

      Parameters:
      subscriptionId - The subscription id.
      Returns:
      The response from the API call

      Exception - if the API call fails

      options - additional options

    • listPushSubscriptionDeliveries

      public SubscriberListPushSubscriptionDeliveriesRequestBuilder listPushSubscriptionDeliveries()
      List Push Subscription Event Deliveries

      Gets a list of a push subscription's event deliveries.

      Returns:
      The call builder

    • listPushSubscriptionDeliveries

      public SubscriberListPushSubscriptionDeliveriesResponse listPushSubscriptionDeliveries(String subscriptionId) throws Exception
      List Push Subscription Event Deliveries

      Gets a list of a push subscription's event deliveries.

      Parameters:
      subscriptionId - The subscription id.
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

    • listPushSubscriptionDeliveries

      public SubscriberListPushSubscriptionDeliveriesResponse listPushSubscriptionDeliveries(String subscriptionId, Optional<String> filter, Optional<Integer> pageSize, Optional<String> pageToken, Optional<Options> options) throws Exception
      List Push Subscription Event Deliveries

      Gets a list of a push subscription's event deliveries.

      Parameters:
      subscriptionId - The subscription id.
      filter - A CEL string to filter results; See the [CEL Search](https://developer.apexclearing.com/apex-fintech-solutions/docs/cel-search) page in Guides for more information; If left empty, all deliveries the user has permission to view are returned; Filter options include: `name` `delivery_id` `event` `event_publish_time` `result` `last_response` `last_send_time` `duration`
      pageSize - The number of entries to return in a single page; Default = 100; Maximum = 1000
      pageToken - Page token used for pagination; Supplying a page token returns the next page of results
      options - additional options
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails
